Issues: Lack of distinct, unique intellectual property (IP): The core message ('Travel the World') is generic. While the typography is stylized, the design elements themselves might be easily replicated, reducing long-term unique value.
Print Quality Potential: The contrast and outlines are vibrant, suggesting good potential for print, but commercial viability depends heavily on the resolution and file format quality.

Technical Skill/Originality Score: The design relies on common, high-contrast graphic techniques rather than highly complex or novel artistic execution, which may limit its appeal to high-end graphic design markets.
